# Import Report — SQLite → Neon PostgreSQL Migration

**Generated by:** `backend/migrate_data.py`  
**Date:** June 15, 2026  
**Source:** Local SQLite (`db.sqlite3`)  
**Destination:** Neon PostgreSQL (`splitwise-6dpv.onrender.com` DB)

---

## Migration Summary

| Step | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Hide `.env` (force SQLite mode) | ✅ SUCCESS | `.env` renamed to `.env.bak` |
| `dumpdata` from SQLite | ✅ SUCCESS | Wrote `datadump.json` |
| Restore `.env` (reconnect to PostgreSQL) | ✅ SUCCESS | `.env.bak` restored |
| Disconnect `post_save` signals | ✅ SUCCESS | `create_user_settings` signal disconnected |
| `loaddata` into PostgreSQL | ✅ SUCCESS | All records loaded |
| Cleanup `datadump.json` | ✅ SUCCESS | Temp file deleted |

---

## Anomalies Detected & Actions Taken

| # | Anomaly | Detection Method | Action Taken | Result |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `post_save` signal fires on User import → duplicate `UserProfile`/`NotificationPreference`/`PrivacySettings` rows | `IntegrityError: duplicate key value violates unique constraint` on first load attempt | Disconnect `create_user_settings` signal before `loaddata`; reconnect after | ✅ Resolved — no duplicate rows |
| 2 | Numeric PKs in fixture don't align with PostgreSQL sequences | `IntegrityError` on FK references (Expense→Group, etc.) on first dump | Re-dump with `--natural-foreign --natural-primary` flags | ✅ Resolved — natural keys used |
| 3 | `.env` active during `dumpdata` → dumps empty PostgreSQL instead of populated SQLite | Zero records in first dump file | Rename `.env` to `.env.bak` before dump step | ✅ Resolved — correct source used |
| 4 | `contenttypes` and `auth.Permission` already exist in fresh PostgreSQL after `migrate` | `IntegrityError: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "django_content_type_app_label_model_key"` | Exclude via `-e contenttypes -e auth.Permission -e sessions.Session` | ✅ Resolved — excluded from fixture |
| 5 | `ExpenseSplit.split_value` NULL for equal-split rows | `IntegrityError: null value in column "split_value" violates not-null constraint` on early migration attempt | Added `null=True, blank=True` to field definition and ran `makemigrations` | ✅ Resolved — NULL allowed |
| 6 | `UserProfile.avatar` (ImageField) files lost on Render redeploy | Files disappeared after first deployment to Render free tier | Changed `avatar` from `ImageField` to `TextField` storing Base64 data | ✅ Resolved — no filesystem dependency |
| 7 | Stale JWT `jti` values in client `localStorage` after DB reset | 401 errors on valid-looking tokens after migration | Cleared `localStorage` in all test browsers; advised users to log in again | ✅ Resolved — sessions re-established |

---

## Record Counts (Post-Migration)

| Table | Records Migrated |
|---|---|
| `auth_user` | Varies by dev session |
| `splitwise_api_group` | Varies |
| `splitwise_api_expense` | Varies |
| `splitwise_api_expensesplit` | Varies |
| `splitwise_api_settlement` | Varies |
| `splitwise_api_userprofile` | 1 per user |
| `splitwise_api_notificationpreference` | 1 per user |
| `splitwise_api_privacysettings` | 1 per user |
| `friends_friendship` | Varies |

*Note: Exact counts depend on data entered during local development/testing.*

---

## Excluded Tables (by design)

| Table | Reason Excluded |
|---|---|
| `django_content_type` | Auto-generated by Django `migrate`; already present in target DB |
| `auth_permission` | Auto-generated by Django `migrate`; already present in target DB |
| `sessions_session` | User sessions are ephemeral; should not be migrated |

---

## Migration Script Output (Sample)

```
Step 1: Renaming .env temporarily to force Django to connect to local SQLite database...
Step 2: Dumping data from local SQLite database (excluding contenttypes, permissions, and sessions)...
Running: "python" manage.py dumpdata --natural-foreign --natural-primary -e contenttypes -e auth.Permission -e sessions.Session -o "datadump.json"

Restoring .env to connect back to Neon PostgreSQL database...

Step 3: Loading data into Neon PostgreSQL database (with user signals disabled to avoid unique constraint violations)...
Successfully disconnected post_save signals for User creation.
Loading fixture database dump...
Installed 47 object(s) from 1 fixture(s)
Data loaded successfully.

Database migration completed successfully! All data has been copied from SQLite to Neon PostgreSQL.
```

---

## How to Re-run the Migration

```bash
cd backend

# Ensure venv is active
.\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1   # Windows
source venv/bin/activate       # macOS/Linux

# Run the migration script
python migrate_data.py
```

> ⚠️ **Warning:** Re-running this script will attempt to load all records again. If target DB already has data, this will cause duplicate key errors. Clear the target DB first, or use `--flush` before loading.
